response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies; while they have some C++ exposure from 2014–2015, it is neither recent nor deep enough to meet core qualifications, and there is no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or mentoring experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with diverse tech exposure
Active open-source contributor and technical educator
Demonstrated ability to lead and mentor via workshops and community projects
concerns: Only 1–2 years of C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or distributed systems leadership
Lacks documented experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or setting architectural standards
